Create, modify, scaffold, review, or explain OlivOS Python plugins from user requirements. Use when working with OlivOS plugin templates, events, APIs, message structures, user-module APIs, OlivaDiceCore integrations, dice/TRPG rule plugins, character-sheet extensions, or any OlivOS plugin code generation task. Keywords: OlivOS, OlivOS plugin, OlivaDiceCore, running group plugin, QQ robot plugin.

en:狩魂者TRPG中文规则解读、规则重点梳理、建卡辅助、战斗与行动检定裁定、D:
Soul Hunter TRPG Chinese rules interpretation, key rules sorting out, card building assistance, combat and action test determination, DH running group hosting, soul hunting event creation, NPC/creature/prop design and original rule table lookup skills. Use when the user asks about Soul Hunter TRPG, Shouhunzhe TRPG, Soul Hunter Adaptation Rules, DH Hosting, Spiritual Knowledge, Psychic Abilities, Soul Weapons, Action Checks, Combat, Soul Hunting Events, Soul Hunting Manual, Creature Creation, Item Examples, or wants a Chinese tabletop RPG rules interpretation or session-prep answer grounded in this rulebook.
